# @cloud/ui - Documentation for LLMs

> `@cloud/ui` is the shared React design-system package for Cloud applications. It provides accessible UI primitives, business-oriented recipes, page layouts, list filtering, charts, themes, localization messages, and semantic Tailwind CSS tokens for consistent operational interfaces.

## Get Started

- [Package manifest](package.json): Public export map, runtime dependencies, peer dependencies, and the package type-check command.
- [Root exports](src/index.ts): Preferred `@cloud/ui` entry for UI components, layouts, list filters, hooks, theme helpers, sidebar state, and `cn`.
- [UI component exports](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/ui/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/ui` entry for primitives and composed UI recipes.
- [Layout exports](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/layout/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/layout` entry for application shell and page-layout components.
- [Chart exports](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/index.ts): Public `@cloud/ui/components/chart` entry for themed Recharts composition; import charts from this subpath rather than from the root barrel or `recharts`.
- [List-filter exports](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/list-filter/index.ts): Public list filtering family, also re-exported from `@cloud/ui`.
- [Global styles](docs/get-started/global-styles.md): Apply the shared CSS entries once to load Tailwind, fonts, semantic tokens, dark mode, component defaults, and base styles.
- [Component defaults](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/styles/component-defaults.css): Import `@cloud/ui/component-defaults.css` before `@cloud/ui/globals.css` for shared component-level defaults.
- [Theme provider](src/lib/theme.tsx): `ThemeProvider`, `useTheme`, and the light or dark theme contract.
- [Class name utility](src/lib/utils.ts): Use `cn` to merge conditional Tailwind classes without conflicting utilities.
- [Infinite-scroll hook](src/lib/use-infinite-scroll.ts): Use `useInfiniteScroll` to load incremental results from an observed sentinel.
- [List-filter hook](src/lib/use-list-filters.ts): Use `useListFilters` to manage separate draft and applied filter state.
- [Responsive hook](src/lib/use-is-mobile.ts): Use `useIsMobile` when behavior, rather than CSS layout alone, must respond to the mobile breakpoint.
- [Sidebar state](src/lib/sidebar.tsx): Use `SidebarProvider` and `useSidebar` to coordinate expanded, collapsed, and mobile navigation state.
- [Sidebar cookie](src/lib/sidebar-cookie.ts): Use `SIDEBAR_COOKIE` when server and client code must share the persisted sidebar-state key.
- [English messages](messages/en.json): Default English strings used by localized UI components.
- [Simplified Chinese messages](messages/zh-CN.json): Default Simplified Chinese strings used by localized UI components.
- [Japanese messages](messages/ja.json): Default Japanese strings used by localized UI components.

## Components

- [Accordion](components/accordion.md): Show related content in independently expandable sections.
- [Action footer](components/action-footer.md): Place persistent cancel, back, and submit actions at the bottom of a task surface.
- [Advanced filter](components/advanced-filter-sheet.md): Compose grouped fields in a sheet for filters that do not fit the quick filter bar.
- [Advanced filter button](components/advanced-filter-button.md): Open advanced filtering and indicate the number of active advanced conditions.
- [Alert](components/alert.md): Communicate inline information, success, warnings, or errors with optional actions.
- [Alert dialog](components/alert-dialog.md): Require explicit confirmation before a consequential action.
- [App header](components/app-header.md): Render the persistent application header and its navigation or action slots.
- [Aspect ratio](components/aspect-ratio.md): Keep media or embedded content at a stable width-to-height ratio.
- [Avatar](components/avatar.md): Represent a person or entity with an image, fallback, or compact group.
- [Badge](components/badge.md): Label status, severity, category, or compact metadata using semantic tones.
- [Breadcrumb](components/breadcrumb.md): Compose a low-level hierarchical navigation trail.
- [Breadcrumbs](components/breadcrumbs.md): Render application breadcrumbs from typed item data.
- [Button](components/button.md): Trigger commands with standard variants, sizes, icons, loading behavior, and danger semantics.
- [Calendar](components/calendar.md): Display a calendar grid for date selection.
- [Card](components/card.md): Group related content with standard header, content, action, footer, padding, and elevation slots.
- [Carousel](components/carousel.md): Navigate a horizontal sequence of panels or media with controls and dots.
- [Chart bar](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-bar.tsx): Render themed Recharts bars, including stacked shapes and per-cell color resolution.
- [Chart container](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart.tsx): Provide chart configuration, responsive sizing, semantic series colors, and shared chart context.
- [Chart legend](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-legend.tsx): Render a themed legend for chart series.
- [Chart pie callout](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-pie-callout.tsx): Add readable labels and connector lines to pie or donut sectors.
- [Chart sparkline](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-sparkline.tsx): Show a compact trend visualization without full chart chrome.
- [Chart states](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-states.tsx): Render standard chart loading and empty states.
- [Chart tooltip](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/chart/chart-tooltip.tsx): Display themed values and series metadata on chart interaction.
- [Checkbox](components/checkbox.md): Select one or more independent boolean options.
- [Collapsible](components/collapsible.md): Show or hide one region from a trigger without accordion grouping.
- [Combobox](components/combobox.md): Search and select an option from a larger collection.
- [Command](components/command.md): Build searchable command menus and command dialogs.
- [Content header](components/content-header.md): Head plain dashboard or settings content that does not use a resource-management page band.
- [Context menu](components/context-menu.md): Present contextual actions from a secondary-click or equivalent trigger.
- [Date picker](components/date-picker.md): Enter or select one localized date.
- [Date range picker](components/date-range-picker.md): Select a localized date interval with optional presets.
- [Date-time picker](components/date-time-picker.md): Select a date and time as one field.
- [Drawer](components/drawer.md): Present a task or supplementary content in a gesture-friendly sliding panel.
- [Dropdown menu](components/dropdown-menu.md): Group contextual commands, choices, and submenus under a trigger.
- [Dropzone](components/dropzone.md): Accept dragged or selected files and render file rows with upload status.
- [Empty](components/empty.md): Explain an empty or zero-results state and offer an optional recovery action.
- [Field](components/field.md): Associate a form control with its label, hint, required state, and validation error.
- [Hover card](components/hover-card.md): Reveal supplementary content when a trigger is hovered or focused.
- [Input](components/input.md): Capture a single line of text with standard field styling and states.
- [Input group](components/input-group.md): Combine an input or textarea with addons, text, and compact actions.
- [Input OTP](components/input-otp.md): Capture a segmented one-time password or verification code.
- [Key value](components/key-value.md): Display labeled resource properties in responsive definition grids.
- [Label](components/label.md): Provide an accessible label for a form control.
- [Layout](components/layout.md): Establish the application shell around sidebar, header, and scrollable content.
- [List applied filters](components/applied-filters.md): Display the currently applied filter chips and clear action.
- [List condition band](components/list-condition-band.md): Arrange quick filters, advanced filtering, and applied filter feedback.
- [List filter chip](components/filter-chip.md): Represent one removable applied filter.
- [List search input](components/search-input.md): Capture and submit free-text list search using shared behavior.
- [List summary bar](components/list-summary-bar.md): Show result counts and low-chrome list actions above a table.
- [Load more](components/load-more.md): Request another page of results in incremental-loading interfaces.
- [Log console](components/log-console.md): Present timestamped, leveled log lines in a dense operational console.
- [Menubar](components/menubar.md): Build a persistent application-style command menu bar.
- [Modal](components/modal.md): Focus the user on a bounded task while keeping the underlying page visible.
- [Navigation menu](components/navigation-menu.md): Build structured navigation with expandable content panels.
- [Object tile](components/object-tile.md): Show a selectable or actionable entity with compact supporting metadata.
- [Page body](components/page-body.md): Own page-level padding, width, and vertical spacing inside the application scroll area.
- [Page header](components/page-header.md): Head resource list and create pages with title, description, and actions.
- [Page header band](components/page-header-band.md): Head resource detail pages with navigation, metadata, actions, and optional tabs.
- [Pagination](components/pagination.md): Navigate a collection when only previous, next, and page controls are needed.
- [Popover](components/popover.md): Display contextual information or lightweight controls anchored to a trigger.
- [Progress](components/progress.md): Communicate known operation completion with semantic tone and labels.
- [Radio group](components/radio-group.md): Select exactly one option from a visible set.
- [Resizable panels](components/resizable.md): Divide a workspace into user-resizable regions.
- [Rich pagination](components/rich-pagination.md): Navigate server-paginated collections with range, page size, and total count.
- [Scroll area](components/scroll-area.md): Provide a styled overflow region with optional custom scrollbars.
- [Select](components/select.md): Choose one option from a compact dropdown list.
- [Semantic tone](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/ui/_tone.ts): Share the neutral, success, warning, error, and info vocabulary across status-bearing components.
- [Separator](components/separator.md): Visually or semantically divide adjacent content.
- [Sheet](components/sheet.md): Open supplementary controls or content from an edge of the viewport.
- [Sidebar](components/sidebar.md): Render grouped, nested application navigation from typed sections.
- [Sidebar trigger](components/sidebar-trigger.md): Toggle the shared sidebar from a compact icon control.
- [Skeleton](components/skeleton.md): Reserve layout while content is loading.
- [Slider](components/slider.md): Select a numeric value or range along a track.
- [Spinner](components/spinner.md): Indicate a compact indeterminate operation in progress.
- [Stat card](components/stat-card.md): Present a key metric, trend, and supporting description.
- [Status card](components/status-card.md): Summarize the current state of a resource or process with semantic emphasis.
- [Step indicator](components/step-indicator.md): Show progress through a fixed sequence of task steps.
- [Stepper](components/stepper.md): Adjust a numeric value with increment and decrement controls.
- [Switch](components/switch.md): Toggle a setting that takes effect immediately.
- [Table](components/table.md): Render typed business data with sorting, density, selection, sticky headers, and row actions.
- [Tabs](components/tabs.md): Switch between peer content sections within the same surface.
- [Textarea](components/textarea.md): Capture multi-line plain text with standard states.
- [Theme toggle](components/theme-toggle.md): Switch among the supported visual themes.
- [Time picker](https://github.com/Newland-Payment-Technology-US-Co-Ltd/cloud-next-scaffold/blob/develop/packages/ui/src/components/ui/recipes/time-picker.tsx): Enter or select a localized time value.
- [Timeline](components/timeline.md): Present events, actors, times, and statuses in chronological order.
- [Toast](components/toaster.md): Announce transient operation feedback through `Toaster` and `toast`.
- [Toggle](components/toggle.md): Represent one pressed or selected control with standard button behavior.
- [Toggle controls](components/toggles.md): Render checkbox, radio, and switch choices as richer selectable rows.
- [Toggle group](components/toggle-group.md): Select one or more values from a compact group of toggles.
- [Tooltip](components/tooltip.md): Explain an unfamiliar control on hover or keyboard focus.
- [Virtual table](components/virtual-table.md): Render large typed datasets efficiently with row virtualization.

## Patterns

Each entry states the condition that selects it. Read the conditions here and pick the branch before opening a pattern.

- [List page](patterns/list-page.md): Use when the page's job is to find, compare, and act on many records. The default collection shape — page header, filter band, applied chips, summary bar, typed table, empty state, and rich pagination.
- [Advanced filtering](patterns/advanced-filtering.md): Use when the fields do not fit the quick filter bar — grouped, rare, or numerous conditions. Adds a right-side sheet with deferred apply; the quick bar alone stays in the list page.
- [Create form](patterns/create-form.md): Use for a single-page create or edit. **The default create shape.** Many fields is not a reason to leave it — numerous but independent fields stay on one page, split into section cards.
- [Create wizard](patterns/create-wizard.md): Use **only** when the flow is genuinely staged: a later step depends on an earlier answer, the flow branches, there is a review gate, or an external process runs between steps. Otherwise use the create form.
- [Edit resource](patterns/edit-resource.md): Use for **any** edit of an existing record — a dedicated page carrying the create form's shape, pre-filled and dirty-tracked. **The only sanctioned edit shape:** there is no inline edit (no primitive exists) and the legacy split-board edit must not be copied. State transitions — lock, reset password, delete — are actions, never form fields.
- [Unsaved changes](patterns/unsaved-changes.md): **Required on every create and edit page.** Guard the dirty form on exit. The guard is partial by design — `onNavigate` catches `<Link>` clicks, `beforeunload` catches tab close, and **nothing** catches `router.push()` or the back button. Read before writing a form.
- [Detail page](patterns/detail-page.md): Use when a single record is the subject of the page. Header band, tabs, key-value overview, related sections, metadata, and permission-aware actions.
- [Delete patterns](patterns/delete-patterns.md): **Start here before building any delete.** The tier follows the blast radius, computed per record at render time — not per resource type. The same button is a different tier on a different row.
- [One-click delete](patterns/one-click-delete.md): No dialog; _Undo_ in the toast. Use **only** when both hold: the blast radius is the record alone, **and** the server soft-deletes. A hard delete disqualifies it — take the confirmation instead.
- [Delete with confirmation](patterns/delete-with-confirmation.md): One dismissable `ConfirmModal`. **The default delete tier** — the record cannot be recreated with a click, but destroying it changes nothing outside itself. A role nobody holds; a pending invitation.
- [Delete with additional confirmation](patterns/delete-with-additional-confirmation.md): The user types the record's name to unlock the confirm, in an `AlertDialog` with no escape hatch. Use when the delete reaches **past** the record — other rows cascade, or other people lose permissions. A role eleven users hold.
- [Data visualization](patterns/data-visualization.md): Use when the page must show quantity, trend, or proportion. Chart composition through the themed `@cloud/ui/components/chart` surface, semantic token colors, and standard chart states.
- [Action weight](patterns/action-weight.md): Read before placing any button. Which variant an action takes — **the variant follows the slot, not the verb.** The same _Export_ is `secondary` in a page header and `ghost` in a summary bar.
- [Empty states](patterns/empty-states.md): Read when a collection renders zero rows. Three different states with three different recoveries — first-run empty, filtered zero-results, and no-access. Picking the wrong one strands the user.
- [Errors and validation](patterns/errors-and-validation.md): Read when anything can fail. Error-code protocol, validation boundaries, centralized handling, and which surface each failure appears on.
- [Interactive surfaces](patterns/interactive-surfaces.md): Read when a surface responds to the pointer. Hover, selected, navigational, selectable, row-action, and clickable-card rules.
- [Permission gating](patterns/permission-gating.md): Read when an action or a route is not available to everyone. Client and server gates, typed permission codes, effective permissions, and what to render instead of a forbidden action.
- [Side navigation](patterns/side-navigation.md): Read when a module adds a menu entry. Sidebar projection from module manifests and effective permissions — menu levels, icons, ordering, accessibility.
- [Timestamps](patterns/timestamps.md): Read when a time is stored, rendered, or entered. Integer seconds in storage; absolute or relative at the render edge, chosen deliberately.
- [Portal page rules](../../.claude/team-rule/coding-rules/ui_ui-and-pages.md): Binding page composition, density, accessibility, action hierarchy, lists, forms, details, color, and typography guidance.

## Demos

- [Demos](demos/index.md): Compilable `@cloud/ui` page and chart examples. Start here to select a template, then adapt it to the application module.

## Foundations

- [Design tokens](foundations/design-tokens.md): Connect CSS variables, Tailwind utilities, and component props, and select tokens by semantic intent.
- [Colors](foundations/colors.md): Apply surface, content, line, status, category, and chart colors without hardcoded values.
- [Spacing and sizing](foundations/spacing.md): Choose shared spacing, control sizes, container widths, breakpoints, and component-owned dimensions.
- [Typography](foundations/typography.md): Use Geist, the type scale, semantic font roles, weights, and numeric alignment consistently.
- [Elevation](foundations/elevation.md): Apply the shadow ladder, Card elevation, overlay depth, and focus treatment according to interaction depth.
- [Theming](foundations/theming.md): Activate light or dark tokens and coordinate DOM selectors with React theme state.
- [Motion](foundations/motion.md): Use shared durations and easing while preserving reduced-motion behavior.
- [Responsive layout](foundations/responsive-layout.md): Choose viewport breakpoints, container-responsive composition, auto-fit grids, or behavior-only mobile detection.
- [Accessibility](foundations/accessibility.md): Preserve labels, keyboard interaction, focus, ARIA semantics, feedback, and reduced-motion support.
- [Page layout](foundations/page-layout.md): Compose application shells and list, create, detail, dashboard, and settings pages from shared layout primitives.

## Code Snippets

- [List page source](docs/examples/list-page.tsx): Copy and adapt the standard list composition.
- [Advanced-filter list source](docs/examples/list-page-advanced-filter.tsx): Copy and adapt the advanced filtering composition.
- [Create form source](docs/examples/create-form.tsx): Copy and adapt the single-page create composition.
- [Create wizard source](docs/examples/create-wizard.tsx): Copy and adapt the staged create composition.
- [Detail page source](docs/examples/detail-page.tsx): Copy and adapt the resource detail composition.
- [Chart source](docs/examples/charts.tsx): Copy and adapt themed chart compositions without importing Recharts directly.
